_meta.purpose: Antibiogram / EUCAST expert rules -> intrinsic resistance, alert phenotypes, and reporting rules. Feeds the AI interpretation + RAG so susceptibility reports are sense-checked. Decision support; the microbiologist authorises. Confirm against the CURRENT EUCAST/CLSI breakpoint tables.
_meta.source: EUCAST Expert Rules v3.x + Intrinsic Resistance tables; CLSI M100. Curated for JORINOVA NEXUS.

staphylococcus.name: Staphylococcus spp.
staphylococcus.note: Never report the above as susceptible.

enterococcus.name: Enterococcus spp.
enterococcus.note: Cephalosporins are INEFFECTIVE even if the disc looks susceptible — never report S.

enterococcus_faecium.name: E. faecium
enterococcus_faecium.note: More resistant than E. faecalis; check ampicillin + vancomycin.

proteus_mirabilis.name: Proteus / Morganella / Providencia
proteus_mirabilis.note: Never report colistin S for Proteae.

pseudomonas_aeruginosa.name: P. aeruginosa
pseudomonas_aeruginosa.note: Only anti-pseudomonal agents apply (ceftazidime, cefepime, pip-tazo, meropenem, aminoglycosides, ciprofloxacin, colistin).

stenotrophomonas.name: Stenotrophomonas maltophilia
stenotrophomonas.note: Treat with co-trimoxazole; carbapenems are ineffective — a carbapenem-S result is an ERROR.

mrsa.name: MRSA (cefoxitin R / mecA+)
mrsa.rule: Report resistant to ALL beta-lactams EXCEPT anti-MRSA agents (ceftaroline/ceftobiprole)
mrsa.note: Infection-control alert; do NOT report other beta-lactams as S.

esbl.name: ESBL producer
esbl.rule: Resistant to penicillins + all cephalosporins + aztreonam (report per current EUCAST — report as tested, but flag ESBL)
esbl.note: Carbapenems / pip-tazo may remain active; infection-control alert.

carbapenemase_cre.name: Carbapenemase / CRE
carbapenemase_cre.rule: Any carbapenem non-susceptible Enterobacterales -> confirm carbapenemase (mCIM/PCR)
carbapenemase_cre.note: Urgent infection-control notification; limited options (ceftazidime-avibactam, colistin).

vrsa_visa.name: VISA/VRSA
vrsa_visa.rule: Reduced vancomycin susceptibility in S. aureus -> refer/confirm

hlar_enterococcus.name: High-level aminoglycoside resistance (HLAR)
hlar_enterococcus.rule: If HLAR, aminoglycoside SYNERGY with a cell-wall agent is lost

inducible_clindamycin.name: Inducible clindamycin resistance (D-test+)
inducible_clindamycin.rule: Erythromycin-R + clindamycin-S with positive D-zone -> REPORT clindamycin RESISTANT

penicillin_resistant_pneumococcus.name: Penicillin-non-susceptible S. pneumoniae
penicillin_resistant_pneumococcus.rule: Use oxacillin screen -> confirm with penicillin MIC; meningitis vs non-meningitis breakpoints differ

no_susceptible_over_ineffective.name: Do not report S for intrinsically-resistant agents
no_susceptible_over_ineffective.rule: Suppress/override any 'S' that contradicts intrinsic resistance

cascade_reporting.name: Cascade/selective reporting
cascade_reporting.rule: Report narrow-spectrum first; reveal broad-spectrum only if resistant — antimicrobial stewardship

urine_only_agents.name: Urine-only agents
urine_only_agents.rule: Nitrofurantoin, fosfomycin, pivmecillinam -> report ONLY for uncomplicated cystitis

verify_unusual.name: Verify unusual/exceptional results
verify_unusual.rule: Confirm exceptional phenotypes (e.g. carbapenem-R that is normally S, colistin-R) before reporting
